mano_cua.result_summary: clear()后renderFromHTML()失败：TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'deleteContents') at Caret.insertContentAtCaretPosition。编辑器保持空白，内容未渲染。clear()没有正确重置Caret内部状态。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: After clear(), renderFromHTML() throws TypeError at caret.ts:408 because Caret internal state is null. Editor remains blank. Bug confirmed.
